The runner could be better. Clean things up and make it more robust. Use your
best judgment on what to change.

This spec is intentionally underspecified: its acceptance criteria are
subjective and not checkable, so intake should BLOCK and ask for concrete,
verifiable criteria rather than proceeding. It exists to exercise that path.
